_meta.comment: BiscuitCode i18n bundle, English. Source of truth for every user-facing string. CI test (Phase 2 + 9) asserts every t('key') lookup in src/ resolves here. Add new keys at the bottom of each section as phases register them. Do NOT remove keys after they ship — translation effort would be wasted.

common.tagline: An AI coding environment, served warm.

E001.msg: BiscuitCode needs a system keyring to store API keys safely. Install gnome-keyring with the command below.

E002.msg: BiscuitCode can't access files outside your workspace folder ({{path}}). Open a different workspace if you need to work with that file.

E003.msg: Couldn't open a new terminal. Reason: {{reason}}. Try closing other terminals.

E004.msg: Your Anthropic API key was rejected. Check the key in Settings → Models.

E005.msg: Couldn't reach Anthropic. Check your connection.

E006.msg: Anthropic is rate-limiting your requests. Try again in {{retry_after_seconds}} seconds.

E007.msg: Gemma 4 isn't available on your Ollama version. Using Gemma 3 instead. Run the command below to upgrade Ollama and access Gemma 4.

E008.msg: You declined the write to {{path}}. The agent's run was paused.

E009.msg: BiscuitCode blocked the shell command `{{command}}` for safety. The agent's run was paused.

E010.msg: Couldn't save an undo point for {{path}}. The write was NOT performed. Free disk space or check file permissions.

E011.msg: Can't undo this step — the saved version of {{path}} is missing or corrupted.

E012.msg: Git push failed: {{git_stderr}}. Check the Terminal panel for full output.

E013.msg: The {{language}} language server isn't installed. Install with the command below.

E014.msg: The {{language}} language server crashed. Code intelligence is disabled for this language until you restart BiscuitCode.

E016.msg: BiscuitCode's bundled fonts didn't load. Falling back to system fonts. Re-installing the .deb usually fixes this.

E017.msg: Couldn't check for updates. Check your connection.

E018.msg: Couldn't download the update: {{reason}}. Try again later or download manually from the releases page.

welcome.title: Welcome to BiscuitCode
welcome.subtitle: Let's get you coding in under two minutes.

pickModels.title: Pick your AI models
pickModels.subtitle: Add at least one provider to continue. You can change this anytime in Settings.

openFolder.title: Open a folder
openFolder.subtitle: BiscuitCode works best with a project folder open. You can also continue without one.
